issue: run_matlab_safe.bat uses matlab -batch run('script') but docs (AGENT_RULES.md repo_execution_rules.md) still describe eval(fileread(...)) as the mechanism
recommended_action: Align normative docs with implemented wrapper; add one-line implementation note in wrapper header comment to reduce agent confusion

issue: Preflight validate_matlab_runnable.ps1 is documented as part of the pipeline (repo_context_infra AGENT_RULES run_system expectations) but is not invoked by the current batch wrapper
recommended_action: Non-blocking: document actual optional pre-run step; or wire validator as soft-check script; avoid claiming enforcement where absent

issue: run_switching_canonical.m does not write repo-root run_dir_pointer.txt required by docs/run_system.md section 6 (wrapper discovery contract)
recommended_action: Add pointer write after run_dir known (pattern in run_minimal_canonical.m); keep parallel-safe naming strategy in design package

issue: execution_status.csv schema differs: docs/run_system.md mandates EXECUTION_STATUS INPUT_FOUND ERROR_MESSAGE N_T MAIN_RESULT_SUMMARY; run_switching_canonical uses EXECUTION_STARTED WRITE_SUCCESS ERROR
recommended_action: Declare single canonical schema for Switching infra; map or migrate columns; soft-warning in audits until unified

issue: Failure path in run_switching_canonical catch may write execution_status.csv under repoRoot when no run context exists (run_dir empty)
recommended_action: YES
column8: Design minimal failure sink: dedicated run_id failure folder or mandatory createRunContext before any work

issue: Early probe writes hardcoded C:/Dev/matlab-functions/execution_probe_top.txt before run_dir exists; non-portable and ambiguous for traceability
recommended_action: Remove hardcoded path; write first probe only under run_dir after mkdir or use dynamic repoRoot only

issue: Batch creates tools/temp_runner.m with pause(1) but MATLAB_COMMAND runs the user script not the runner file (dead path)
recommended_action: Delete unused runner generation or document as reserved for future

issue: AGENT_ENTRYPOINT.md is extremely short while repo_execution_rules embeds a long duplicated MATLAB policy block
recommended_action: Split: keep AGENT_ENTRYPOINT as 10-line pointer; trim duplicate policy from secondary docs with links

issue: context_bundle.json mixes scientific claims with infra routing; agents may treat it as execution truth
recommended_action: Mark infra vs science sections in bundle or add docs/repo_context_minimal.md as execution-only anchor

issue: Multiple overlapping audits in reports/ and tables/ for Switching execution with no index; agents repeat discovery
recommended_action: Maintain system_health.md with last-reviewed dates and pointers to authoritative rows only

issue: docs/repo_context_infra.md describes fingerprints timeout post-checks run_dir_pointer discovery that do not match minimal run_matlab_safe.bat
recommended_action: Retag PART of repo_context_infra as aspirational or update to match code; cite actual bat behavior first

issue: docs/repo_map.md references runs/fingerprints and results/README.md paths that may be missing or stale
recommended_action: Validate links in repo_map; mark legacy zones explicitly

issue: Overlapping repository navigation: repo_map.md repository_map.md repository_structure.md
recommended_action: ESSENTIAL: one; others USEFUL with deprecation banner for duplicated tables

issue: Large figure_repair document cluster is low value for Switching infra work
recommended_action: Classify as OUT_OF_SCOPE for Switching infra; cross-link only

issue: Repeated Switching robustness canonical audits without single consolidated machine-readable contract file
recommended_action: Use canonical_state_freeze or infrastructure_broad_audit follow-up CSV as index; avoid new narrative-only audits

issue: repo_execution_rules master policy block duplicates AGENT_RULES and infrastructure_laws content
recommended_action: KEEP ESSENTIAL rules in one place; others USEFUL as abbreviated checklist

issue: Legacy vs canonical comparisons scattered across reports inflate token load
recommended_action: Single switching_canonical_definition + boundary doc; defer legacy to archive pointer

issue: Strict run_system MUST rules conflict with soft validator (FailValidation emits WARN and continues in validate_matlab_runnable.ps1)
recommended_action: Target model: pre-run soft warnings; post-run classification; document failure buckets (NO_MATLAB NO_ENTRY NO_WRITE PARTIAL_OK)

issue: ASCII pre-run STOP in repo_execution_rules vs non-blocking audit philosophy
recommended_action: Reserve hard STOP for non-ASCII and security; else warn and classify

issue: ensureRunStatusFile in createRunContext can silently skip write if fopen fails (no error)
recommended_action: Post-run validation should flag missing run_status.csv when expected

issue: repo-root run_dir_pointer.txt is a single shared file; concurrent agents overwrite each other's pointer
recommended_action: Design run-scoped pointers or include run_id in filename; document exclusive lock or serial wrapper use

issue: createRunContext makeUniqueRunId provides unique run dirs under results/Switching/runs (good isolation)
recommended_action: Preserve; document as primary parallel output isolation mechanism

issue: Experiment string casing: createRunContext uses folder name from experiment param; run_minimal_canonical uses switching lowercase; paths are case-sensitive on some hosts
recommended_action: Standardize experiment key in docs/repo_context_minimal.md (single spelling)

issue: Global tables/ and reports/ at repo root invite cross-agent contention if used
recommended_action: Enforce run-scoped writes only; soft-warning if tooling touches global trees

issue: No single minimal Switching infra context file existed before this audit
recommended_action: ADD docs/repo_context_minimal.md (delivered)

issue: Prompt templates RUN AUDIT FIX PLAN not yet present as repo files
recommended_action: ADD docs/templates/agent_prompt_*.md or reports section stubs; keep under 40 lines each

issue: agent_warnings_log.csv and agent_runs_log.csv not present; no append-only agent activity trace
recommended_action: Define schemas in report; optional implementation later without blocking runs
